## Meeting Purpose

[Review 2025 performance and discuss the 2026 renewal proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong 2025 Performance:** Organic/referral traffic grew from 0 to 4k+ sessions/mo, generating 178 signups and 27 booked demos (Aug–Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Renewal Proposal:** GrowthX proposed a $12k/mo renewal for a higher-quality content strategy (5 articles/wk), landing page SEO, and 10 backlinks/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [**Pricing Standoff:** Exec requested a $10k/mo price to reduce costs, citing GrowthX as their most expensive agency partner and past under-delivery on backlink strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - [**Decision Deferred:** A final decision is set for Jan 6, with Jo to present revised options to Garett and Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)

## Topics

### 2025 Performance Review (Feb–Dec)

  - [**SERP Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Position 1 Keywords:** 19 → 388 (+1,942%)](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Position 2–10 Keywords:** 68 → 1,500 (+2,106%)](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**Traffic & Conversions:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Organic/Referral Sessions:** 0 → 4,000+ per month.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Conversions (Aug–Dec):**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
          - [Signups: 178](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
          - [Booked Demos: 27](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Insight:** Users strongly prefer self-serve signups over demos. A future CRO strategy must align with the primary business goal (PLG vs. Enterprise).](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**AI/LLM Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - **[Overall:](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)** \<1% → 20%
      - [**"AI Roleplay" Category:** 5% → 43%](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Significance:** This growth establishes strong topical authority, which is critical for influencing how LLMs cite the website and for capturing high-intent leads.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### 2026 Renewal Proposal

  - [**Strategic Shift:** The strategy will pivot from the niche "AI roleplay" category to a broader "learning platform" focus, aligning with the upcoming course platform and call scoring features.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [**Proposed Package ($12k/mo):**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
      - [**1. Landing Page SEO:** On-page optimization and backlink support for new commercial pages.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
      - [**2. Editorial Content:** 5 high-quality articles/wk (vs. 10).](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Prioritize quality over quantity. Articles will be more in-depth (e.g., 2,000 words), with FAQs and detailed examples to improve LLM performance.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [**3. Backlinks:** 10 backlinks/mo, focused on supporting new landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
          - [**Note:** The current 24/mo cadence ends in January.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

### Renewal Negotiation

  - [**Exec's Position:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reduce the $12k/mo cost to $10k/mo to manage expenses.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2322.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GrowthX is the most expensive agency partner. Past under-delivery on backlink strategy created a "sour taste" and justifies a price adjustment.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2198.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Consider hiring an in-house writer for \~20 articles/month at a lower cost (e.g., \~$600/article).](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Position:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
      - [**Value:** The $12k/mo package already includes landing page SEO and backlinks as "extras" compared to the standard $12k/mo price for content alone.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
      - [**ROI:** The current lead volume suggests the value exceeds the cost; one closed enterprise deal could cover the annual investment.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Jo will explore options, including a potential credit for past under-delivery or an increased content volume (e.g., 7 articles/wk) to justify the $12k price.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)

### Immediate Priorities

  - [**AI Roleplay Page On-Page SEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [**Action:** Garett to secure 30 mins with Sean this week for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capitalize on recent off-page SEO gains by implementing on-page optimizations before the holidays to compound growth.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**`sales-roleplay-software` Redirect:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**Action:** Garett to secure Sean's approval to implement the pre-built JavaScript code.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The old and new articles are nearly identical; the redirect is needed to consolidate authority.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Placement.com Article Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to use general, existing Placement-style images (e.g., magnifying glass) for new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoid creating a new image generation system to save effort while maintaining brand separation from Exec.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Garett:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)
      - [Secure 30 mins with Sean this week for approval on AI Roleplay SEO and the `sales-roleplay-software` redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [Ensure Sean attends the Jan 6 renewal discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=3061.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2894.0)
      - [Send the renewal proposal to Garett and Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=3088.0)
      - [Explore and prepare revised renewal options for the Jan 6 meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=2894.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Publish new Placement.com articles this week using the agreed-upon image style.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)
      - [Meet on **Jan 6** to finalize the 2026 renewal agreement.](https://fathom.video/share/BaqWmykrLjUBPvsbxZ3YBfhWdPyzzhBM?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)
